heading: About
paragraphs: I'm Opiyo Nickson, an Android, React Native & Web Developer and IT Systems Specialist with a strong passion for building practical, user-focused digital solutions.

I specialize in developing Android applications, web-based systems, and providing hands-on IT support. I've worked on university-level systems, real-world mobile apps, and freelance projects - taking ideas from design through development to deployment.

My technical stack includes Java, Python, JavaScript, React, and React Native, along with modern frameworks and tools. I enjoy continuous learning and aim to build scalable solutions that solve real-world problems.
